name: MyCase Legal Practice Management API
what_it_does: MyCase REST API for cloud-based legal practice management software. Enables AI agents to manage cases and contacts, retrieve time entries and billing data, access document information, track payments and invoices, and integrate MyCase into law firm workflows. MyCase targets small to mid-size law firms with an all-in-one practice management platform.
use_cases: Retrieving case and matter data from legal workflow automation agents
Tracking time entries and generating billing summaries from legal billing agents
Accessing client contact and intake data from CRM integration agents
Integrating MyCase billing data into accounting and payment workflow agents
not_for: Large law firm enterprise needs (MyCase targets small/mid firms)
best_when: A small or mid-size law firm using MyCase wants AI agents to automate billing, track case status, and integrate legal data into client communication and accounting workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Legal case data including client communications and matter details is protected by attorney-client privilege. Handle with extreme care. GDPR and state-specific legal data regulations apply.

auth.notes: MyCase API uses OAuth 2.0. Application registration in MyCase developer portal. User-level auth for accessing specific firm data. Enterprise access required.

pricing.paid_tiers: MyCase subscription required for API access; pricing per attorney
pricing.notes: Law firm practice management platform. Pricing per user per month. API access included.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Attorney-client privileged communications — highest level of data protection required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
No webhooks — must poll for case and billing status changes
Legal data sovereignty — verify where MyCase stores data for multi-jurisdiction compliance
Consider Clio API for more mature developer ecosystem in legal tech
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Attorney-client privileged data. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US data residency. Privileged communication protection required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Attorney-client privileged data. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US-only data residency.
